title: Feat/instantsearch.js/unify connector api
body:
**WIP: this list may change in the near future**

* connectMenu
  * [x] easier implementation of `showMore`
  * [x] remove `currentRefinement` which is not used

* connectHits
  * [x] remove `hitsPerPage` config option

* connectClearAll
  * [x] provide `clearAll` fn on first render
  * [x] provide same instance/reference to `clearAll` fn
  * [x] add `{clearsQuery: boolean}` opt-in


* connectCurrentRefinedValues
  * [x] Move `displayOperator` logic into connector, compute `items[i].name` for the user
  * [x] Use `clearRefinement(item)` and `createURL(item)` instead of `clearRefinementURLs[]` and `clearRefinementClicks[]`
  * [x] add `{clearsQuery: boolean}` opt-in


* connectHitsPerPageSelector
  * [x] Rename `options[]` to `items[]`
  * [x] Add `isRefined` to the `items[]`
  * [x] Rename `connectHitsPerPageSelector` to `connectHitsPerPage`


* connectPriceRanges
  * [x] Make `refine()` taking named arguments instead of two arguments => `refine({ from: ?number, to: ?number })`


* connectToggle
  * [x] fix `createURL` fn which is not returning a string
  * [x] fix root level `count` when there's no off value
  * [x] Make `refine()` taking one argument which is the value of the toggle


* Other
  * [x] Remove `currentRefinement` from connectRefinementList, connectNumericRefinementList, connectPriceRanges, connectStarRating
  * [x] Investigate why pagination widget is not working in demo
  * [x] Check that `refine()` and `createURL()` takes `item.value` instead of a different value everywhere
    * [x] connectHierarchicalMenu
    * [x] connectMenu
    * [x] connectNumericRefinementList
    * [x] connectRefinementList
    * [x] connectStarRating
